case_title: JEWELRY SQUARE ASSOCIATES vs. LIU, REFANG et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEWELRY SQUARE ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIU, REFANG DER SHIN RESTAURANT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 101 UTAH ST, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE PER CRC 522
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, REFANG DER SHIN RESTAURANT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, REFANG DER SHIN RESTAURANT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEWELRY SQUARE ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, REFANG DER SHIN RESTAURANT DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEWELRY SQUARE ASSOCIATES SERVED JAN-31-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, REFANG DER SHIN RESTAURANT

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, REFANG DER SHIN RESTAURANT
